findings.location: Source introductory paragraph (before any section heading)
findings.description: The introductory description stating that field:block corresponds to HTML's `<fieldset>` tag ('HTMLにおける<fieldset>タグに相当する') is omitted from the knowledge file. This provides useful semantic context for AI to understand the widget's HTML rendering model.
findings.source_evidence: :doc:`field_block` は、入力フォームの論理的なまとまりを定義し、見出しを表示するウィジェットである。(HTMLにおける<filedset>タグに相当する。)

findings.location: s3 (内部構造・改修時の留意点)
findings.description: Section s3 contains an unconverted RST cross-reference markup `:doc:`field_block`` in the table cell. This RST artifact should have been converted to plain text (e.g., 'field:block') as it will render as raw markup instead of readable text when consumed by an AI.
findings.source_evidence: /WEB-INF/tags/widget/field/block.tag | :doc:`field_block` の実体となるタグファイル
